arts.ttl: Two major boosts Leeds United’s possibly imminent transfer will bring amid Elland Road spotting
arts.sum: Leeds United could be looking at a free agent soon in the very near future, with the identity of the player seemingly emerging, former Mainz midfielder Josuha Guilavogui . Farke noted the possibility of things moving fast on a free agent signing, so when Leeds featured at Elland Road on Friday night, it wasn’t a total shock that a prospective new addition was seemingly present.

arts.ttl: Leeds United could lose another three defenders for selection vs Watford
arts.sum: Junior Firpo picked up his fourth yellow card of the season on Friday night against Sheffield United. Aside from going top, a win would also put Leeds back onto the two-points-per-game average that is generally needed to go for automatic promotion in a normal EFL season.

arts.ttl: Transfer blow for Leeds United and Aston Villa as EFL starlet seals agreement elsewhere
arts.sum: Leeds United were said to be one of the clubs considering a move to sign Bristol Rovers starlet Kofi Shaw soon, as well as Aston Villa. Leeds aren’t the only side looking at signing the winger, though, with Champions League club Aston Villa said to be keen too.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed v Watford
arts.sum: Leeds United host Tom Cleverley’s Watford this evening looking to secure successive wins in the Championship after a crucial win over Sheffield United last time out. Leeds squad v Watford revealed: Gnonto available

arts.ttl: Why Leeds United attacker has to start vs Watford as competition for places hots up
arts.sum: But given the starring role Joel Piroe has played in United's rise up the table, both Bamford and Joseph may have to wait a little longer to get back into starting XI. Bamford has failed to rediscover the form he produced prior to the injury he suffered back in April, although manager Daniel Farke is adamant the experienced striker still has a big part to play in their promotion push.

arts.sum: Leeds United only sold Archie Gray in the summer, but Mucho Deporte claims Sevilla are eyeing a loan… The post La Liga club target loan swoop for £30m star after Leeds United exit appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Victor Orta wants to offer transfer escape for star man Leeds United sold in the summer
arts.sum: Leeds United were forced into the sale of Archie Gray to Tottenham in the summer window for £40million, but the teenager has found Premier League football hard to come by. Interestingly, a report from Mucho Deporte is now claiming that former Leeds sporting director Victor Orta is looking to bring Gray to his current club Sevilla.

arts.ttl: Farke claimed Leeds would’ve got promoted if 31-year-old wasn’t injured in 2023/24
arts.sum: Leeds United missed out on promotion to the Premier League by a whisker last season, and Daniel Farke has suggested Patrick Bamford’s omission was one cause. The striker, who is apparently growing frustrated with his lack of minutes, is considering leaving the club where he has spent the past six years. arts.ttl: Tom Cleverley launches brutal criticism of Watford squad ahead of Leeds United clash
arts.sum: Hornets boss Cleverley has identified the problem his Watford side face at the moment, and it’s nothing to do with how he’s preparing the team, he thinks it’s down to the players being inconsistent on the basis (via the Watford Observer ): Leeds United host Watford this evening looking to secure back-to-back wins and climb into the automatic promotion places in the process.
